item.description:
What's New

  • Hotkey Selection Improvements - The hotkey selection screen now shows clear instructions on how to speak with EVY. We've also improved the visual layout to make it clearer which modifier keys (left or right) to select, and updated the default hotkey selection.
  • Improved Onboarding Guidance - Reworked the onboarding link to make it more obvious where to find additional help and information.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed Onboarding Loop - Resolved an issue where users would be dropped back into the onboarding flow after completing the context interview.
  • Voice Pill Can Now Be Closed - Fixed a bug where the retrying voice pill could not be dismissed by clicking the close button.
  • Recording Capsule Hiding - Added ability to temporarily hide the recording capsule for one hour for better screen focus.

What's New

  • Improved AI Dictation - Fine-tuned the AI-enhanced dictation to preserve meaningful phrases like "I believe" and "maybe" while still removing filler sounds, resulting in more natural and accurate transcriptions
  • Extended Interview Sessions - Interviews and secondary agents no longer time out after brief inactivity, giving you more time to think and respond at your own pace

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed an issue where the Settings window would not reappear after being closed during the onboarding flow
  • Fixed a crash that could occur when reopening previously closed windows
  • Fixed the update button in the menu bar tray not being clickable when a new release is available
  • Fixed a type error that could cause AI-enhanced dictation to malfunction
  • Improved server connection stability by relaxing timeout thresholds to reduce false disconnections

What's New

  • Hide from Dock - Restored the option to hide EVY from the macOS Dock, giving you control over your Dock visibility preferences

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed an issue where the app could freeze when stopping a meeting recording
